name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Classic Series #M44887# Uninspected Version
▪️Size: 26*26*17.5cm▪️
As a classic masterpiece and a must-have for beginners,
the wine bag designed in 1932 to carry champagne meets contemporary trends,
transforming into a bucket bag that embodies the beauty of heritage,
and is even called the "King of Classics".
It has a unique appeal across generations and ages,
with a large capacity design.
This is a classic King that can accompany you through prosperity,
and is also a bucket bag that every woman needs!
